violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in and back hall. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The walk-in refrigerator had an accumulation of packaging debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Light shield in walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2024
The floors under racks in walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
